mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, username, password_hash, display_name, email, role, status, login_fail_count, locked_until, last_login_at, last_login_ip, password_updated_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT id, tenant_id, username, password_hash, display_name, email, role, status, login_fail_count, locked_until, last_login_at, last_login_ip, password_updated_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT id, tenant_id, username, password_hash, display_name, email, role, status, login_fail_count, locked_until, last_login_at, last_login_ip, password_updated_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (tenant_id, username, password_hash, display_name, email, role, status, login_fail_count, created_at, updated_at, password_updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{role}, #{status}, #{loginFailCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{passwordUpdatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET tenant_id = #{tenantId}, username = #{username}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, display_name = #{displayName}, email = #{email}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, login_fail_count = #{loginFailCount}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, password_updated_at = #{passwordUpdatedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
